interests.title: Travel
interests.desc: I believe that traveling and experiencing different cultures is essential for broadening one's perspective and fostering creativity. I enjoy exploring new places, trying local cuisines, learning history in a immersive way, and placing myself in different ways of life.

interests.title: Outdoors
